title: Genetic Modification of Human Induced Pluripotent Stem Cells (hiPSCs) by Lentiviral Transduction Protocol
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"5tftd","text":"This is the protocol for the genetic modification of human induced pluripotent stem cells (hiPSCs) using lentiviral transduction method.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

steps: Grow and culture 293T cell line in 10 cm plates.
Grow and culture hiPSCs in pre-coated VTN 6 well plates.
When there are enough 293T cells, seed 5 million 293T cells a 10cm plates in 10mL DMEMcomplete media per plasmid of interest.
Grow overnight at 37 deg C and 5% CO2 until 80%-90% confluence.
Change media of wells. Make a master mix in 1.5 mL Eppendorf tubes for each plate as follows: %s %s
Vortex 10s.
Incubate 10 min RT *NEVER OVER 30 MIN*.
Add all of mix to wells dropwise and rock plate and incubate overnight 37 deg C and 5% CO2.
Check cells 24 hours post-transfection.
Split hiPSCs into clumps in StemFlex complete medium. Seed 20% confluency or ~0.1Mper well in 2 mL of 6 well plate. Note: Cell number depends on cell type.
First thing in the morning, exchange the media – add 15 mL pre-warmed DMEM complete media to transfected wells. (This removes the jetPRIME transfection reagent and residue plasmid.).
Check cells 48 hours post-transfection. Collect virus in 50 mL tube.
Centrifuge 1500 rpm for 5 minutes.
Using a 0.45 um PDVF membrane filter and 5 mL syringe, collect virus into new 50 mL tubes. Avoid bottom of tube with cell debris
Concentrate 1:40 [~42-45mL of diluted virus makes approximately 0.8-1mL ofconcentrated virus]
Collect and label MilliporeSigma‱ Amicon‱ Ultra-15 Centrifugal Filter Units.
Rinse column with PBS and spin 2,000 × g for 5 min.
Add up to 10 mL of sample to the Amicon‱ Ultra filter device.
Collect concentrated virus and aliquot 0.2mL per Eppendorf tube. Use virus, other tubes store -80degC for future use if necessary.
o Repeat adding rest of virus to Amicon‱ Ultra filter device and centrifuge again at 2,000 × g maximum for 10 minutes until all virus is concentrated.
Centrifuge at 2,000 × g maximum for 10 minutes.
Remove the culture medium from cells, add 850uL fresh Stemflex complete medium intoeach well of 6 well plate.
Add 150ul virus and 1ug/ml polybrene into cells. Rock plate.
Incubate at 37 C 0 , 5% CO2 overnight.
Centrifuge at 1000rcf for 90min at room temperature.
Replace the medium with 2ml fresh Stemflex complete medium.
Check the expression of plasmid via microscopy (if applicable).
Begin selection (if applicable).
Check the cell status.
Freeze cells to store.
Split cells if necessary.
creator: Sarfraz Ahmed
